title: Stage Outcome Rubric (V8.12 self-grading)
description: Structured rubric for an agent's self-grading or Cody's pre-ladder review. Every stage agent grades own output against the matching rubric BEFORE handoff; Cody re-grades the same rubric at SDD-review and plan-review checkpoints.

stage.description: Pipeline stage this rubric applies to.

owner.description: Agent that produces the output graded by this rubric.

fail_signal.description: Concrete observation that would fail this criterion.

pass_threshold.description: Weighted score required to hand off. Below threshold: self-iterate (up to max_self_iterations) or escalate.

max_self_iterations.description: Max self-grade + revise cycles before Arthur is told and Cody takes over.
